metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_954
metadata.comment:
Rationale: The authors use a co-culture assay to observe VGLut1 co-localizing patches of a synaptophysin-GFP reporter protein This assay measures the recruitment of SVs. Fig. 2B shows that overexpression of a truncated syntenin-1 construct that presumably acts as a dominant negative protein blocks the ability of EphB2 to mediate a trans-synaptic synaptogenic effect. Using a knock-dwon approach, Fig. 2C shows that syntenin-1 is required in presynaptic neurons so that postsynaptic EphB2 can mediate. Experimental description: "Primary dissociated cortical neurons were prepared from embryonic day 17 (E17) to E18 rats"

22/6/2017 Pim
Syntenin dom neg. protein expressed in neurons was traced back to PMID:16421316 and is of *rat* species. Literal: " Rat syntenin-1 was subcloned into pFLAG-CMV2..."
